scripts.dev:tmp: if [ "$IN_DOCKER" = "1" ]; then vite; else rm -rf dist node_modules /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && mkdir -p /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist dist && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules node_modules && vite; fi
scripts.build:tmp: if [ "$IN_DOCKER" = "1" ]; then vite build; else rm -rf dist node_modules /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && mkdir -p /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist dist && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules node_modules && vite build; fi
scripts.preview:tmp: if [ "$IN_DOCKER" = "1" ]; then vite preview --port 5173; else rm -rf dist node_modules /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && mkdir -p /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/dist dist && ln -sfn /tmp/pmo001_tmp/node_modules node_modules && vite preview --port 5173; fi
